# load the json files and inspect basic structure
import json, os, re, sys
qpath = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
hpath = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"
print("exists q:", os.path.exists(qpath))
print("exists h:", os.path.exists(hpath))
with open(qpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata = json.load(f)
with open(hpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hdata = json.load(f)

# show types and sample counts
print(type(qdata), len(qdata) if hasattr(qdata, '__len__') else None)
print(type(hdata), len(hdata) if hasattr(hdata, '__len__') else None)
# show sample entries
for i in range(3):
    print(i, list(qdata[i].keys()))
    print(qdata[i].get('ayah_text')[:120])
print("Hadith sample keys:", list(hdata[0].keys())[:20])
print(hdata[0].get('hadithTxt')[:120] if 'hadithTxt' in hdata[0] else hdata[0].get('Matn','')[:120])

# search for occurrences of substrings from original
subs = ['زُلْزِلَتْ','طَائِفَةٌ','اضطَرَّتْهُمْ','حَتّى','رَأَوْا','سِقَارِ','السَمومِ','عَضُبَ الرِكَابُ','الْقَصَصُ']
for s in subs:
    res = find_phrase(s)
    print(s, len(res))

# Prepare normalization utilities
import unicodedata, re
arabic_tashkeel = ''.join([chr(x) for x in range(0x0610, 0x061A)]) + ''.join([chr(x) for x in range(0x064B,0x0653)]) + ''.join([chr(x) for x in range(0x0654,0x0657)]) + ''.join([chr(x) for x in [0x0670]])
# But easier: use regex to remove tashkeel marks: arabic diacritics often in \u064B-\u0652 etc.
tashkeel_re = re.compile('[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel_re = re.compile('\u0640')
# punctuation: Arabic and others
punct_re = re.compile(r'[^\w\s]', flags=re.UNICODE)  # but this will remove Arabic diacritics? we already removed.
# unify hamza forms: replace various hamzas with bare hamza forms? The developer suggested unify hamza.
def normalize_ar_text(s):
    # Lowercase not necessary for Arabic; remove tashkeel, tatweel
    s = re.sub(tashkeel_re, '', s)
    s = re.sub(tatweel_re, '', s)
    # Normalize various hamza forms to bare letter: 
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا').replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    # Remove punctuation and diacritics etc (preserve Arabic letters and numbers and spaces)
    # Keep Arabic letters and spaces and numbers
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

# LCS function char-level
def lcs_length(a,b):
    # compute length of longest common subsequence for strings a,b
    # dynamic programming O(n*m) but a,b lengths maybe up to 500 -> ok
    n,m = len(a), len(b)
    # Use DP with two rows for memory
    prev = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        cur = [0]*(m+1)
        ai = a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                cur[j] = prev[j-1]+1
            else:
                cur[j] = prev[j] if prev[j] >= cur[j-1] else cur[j-1]
        prev = cur
    return prev[m]

# token F1
def token_f1(a,b):
    atoks = a.split()
    btoks = b.split()
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(atoks)
    cb = Counter(btoks)
    # overlap count
    overlap = sum(min(ca[t], cb.get(t,0)) for t in ca)
    prec = overlap / len(atoks) if len(atoks)>0 else 0.0
    rec = overlap / len(btoks) if len(btoks)>0 else 0.0
    f1 = (2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)) if (prec+rec)>0 else 0.0
    return f1, prec, rec, overlap

# Normalize full snippet
full_snippet = "وَلَوْ شاءَ اللَهُ لَأَمَتَّتْهُمْ بِالْفَضْلِ وَاللَكِّ وَلَئِنْ أَمَتَّتْهُمْ بِالْفَضْلِ وَاللَكِّ لَعَجَّلَ لَهُمْ ذَلِكَ وَلَئِنْ أَمَتَّتْهُمْ حَتّى عَضُبَ الرِكَابُ وَالْقَصَصُ يَطُبُّ اللَهُ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَزُلْزِلَتْ طَائِفَةٌ مِنْهُمْ وَاِضطَرَّتْهُمْ حَتّى رَأَوْا مِثْلَ سِقَارِ السَمومِ مِنَ الْعَجَجِ وَلَوْلَا فَضْلُ اللَهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَتُهُ مَا زَكَى مِنْكُمْ مِنْ أَحَدٍ ثُمَّ أَنتُمْ تَزُدُونَ"
norm_full = normalize_ar_text(full_snippet)
len(full_snippet), norm_full[:200]

# compute similarity scores across qdata
scores = []
for entry in qdata:
    ay = entry['ayah_text']
    norm_ay = normalize_ar_text(ay)
    # compute metrics
    f1, prec, rec, overlap = token_f1(norm_ay, norm_full)
    lcs = lcs_length(norm_ay, norm_full)
    lcs_ratio = lcs / max(len(norm_ay), len(norm_full)) if max(len(norm_ay), len(norm_full))>0 else 0.0
    scores.append((entry['surah_id'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['surah_name'], ay, norm_ay, f1, prec, rec, lcs_ratio, overlap))

# sort by f1 then lcs_ratio
scores_sorted = sorted(scores, key=lambda x: (x[5], x[8]), reverse=True)
top = scores_sorted[:30]
for s in top[:20]:
    print(s[0], s[1], s[2], s[5], s[8], s[9], s[3][:120])
find_phrase('وَلَوْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ')[:20], len(find_phrase('وَلَوْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ'))

# find the exact entry with surah_id 24, ayah 21
cand = None
for entry in qdata:
    if entry['surah_id']==24 and entry['ayah_id']==21:
        cand = entry
        break
cand, cand['ayah_text'][:400] if cand else None

norm_cand = normalize_ar_text(cand['ayah_text'])
f1, prec, rec, overlap = token_f1(norm_cand, norm_full)
lcs = lcs_length(norm_cand, norm_full)
lcs_ratio = lcs / max(len(norm_cand), len(norm_full))
norm_cand[:200], f1, prec, rec, lcs_ratio, overlap, len(norm_cand), len(norm_full)

# prepare tokens from normalized full
full_tokens = set(norm_full.split())
len(full_tokens), list(full_tokens)[:50]

# scan hadith DB for candidates with at least 3 overlapping tokens
top_h = []
for entry in hdata:
    # choose text field: hadithTxt or Matn; hadithTxt might include isnad etc. We'll prefer Matn if exists
    text = entry.get('Matn') or entry.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    norm_text = normalize_ar_text(text)
    # check token overlap
    tok_set = set(norm_text.split())
    overlap = tok_set.intersection(full_tokens)
    if len(overlap) >= 3:
        f1, prec, rec, ol = token_f1(norm_text, norm_full)
        top_h.append((f1, ol, entry['hadithID'], entry.get('title',''), entry.get('Matn', entry.get('hadithTxt',''))[:200]))

# sort top_h by f1
top_h_sorted = sorted(top_h, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
top_h_sorted[:20], len(top_h_sorted)

top_h = []
for entry in hdata:
    text = entry.get('Matn') or entry.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    norm_text = normalize_ar_text(text)
    tok_set = set(norm_text.split())
    overlap = tok_set.intersection(full_tokens)
    if len(overlap) >= 3:
        f1, prec, rec, ol = token_f1(norm_text, norm_full)
        top_h.append((f1, ol, entry.get('hadithID',''), entry.get('title',''), text[:200]))

top_h_sorted = sorted(top_h, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
top_h_sorted[:20], len(top_h_sorted)
